summary: threads list local-filter path now maps --type draft to DRAFT and errors out for done/archived instead of silently returning unfiltered results.
reason: localThreadTypeLabel returned the empty string for draft, done, and archived, so combining those with --label / --participants-file / --intersect-with-stdin dropped the type filter entirely (greptile P1 on PR #595). draft has a single positive label (DRAFT) the existing filter can express; done and archived need negative-label semantics (not-INBOX, not-INBOX/SENT/SPAM/TRASH) the positive-only label index cannot represent, so the local path now returns a clear error pointing the user at the Gmail-passthrough route that supports them natively.
validated_outcome: go build + go vet + go test ./... pass (566/17). Existing intersect-with-stdin test updated to pass --type sent explicitly (it was depending on the silently-dropped default-draft behavior).
